title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules extracted from Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei's approach to deciding what to build with Claude. The video distills their product strategy into actionable principles for developers and entrepreneurs building AI applications.
